items.name_en: Deep 🍷 Wine Red 'Export Product' OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25k Large Diamond Calfskin LP Box 👅👅 Black Gold! Play with the LP Box bag new large diamond pattern 🌟🌟 Version is very classic and atmospheric, the front double C is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! Textured when carried by hand, and adds a casual elegance when worn on the chain. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turns heads when worn~ A definite fashion item ✓ Size: 17x19.5x5cm

items.name_en: Caramel Brown🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Heavyweight, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling in love with the ethereal cream white. Classic diamond quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and luxurious.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 lucky bag", full anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the diamond quilt, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775Size: 12.5×10×7cm

items.name_en: Three colors, two sizes available🌟🌟🌟🌟 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C latest woven flap bag, handmade woven bag, woven shopping bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements that are indispensable in vacation vibes, using imported natural wheat straw grass. Just didn't expect so many bright suede material handbags to appear in the summer vacation series... Matching for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, jewelry embellishments are a must on the handbag, the collector's series ice cream cup is the favorite~ Dimensions: 26cm, 23cm

items.name_en: Large Size《Khaki🍠》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C Latest Woven Flap Bag, Handwoven Bag, Handwoven Bag Shopping Bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements are indispensable in a vacation vibe. Made with imported natural wheat straw, it's surprising to see so many bright-colored suede handbags in the summer vacation series... Perfect for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, the bag is sure to be adorned with jewelry. The favorite is of course the collector series ice cream cup~Size: 26cm
